title: hieracium alatum subsp. soyeroides
intro: Hieracium alatum subsp. soyeroides, also known as hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium alatum subsp. soyeroides include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can help prevent infection. It can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for topical or internal use, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal remedy.
